ab

Selects numeric range iteration in an itera loop.

Syntax: itera ab

Category

iteration

Related

  • [itera](/corpus/itera.html)
  • [ex](/corpus/ex.html)
  • [de](/corpus/de.html)
  • [per](/corpus/per.html)
  • [ab pipeline](/corpus/ab pipeline.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/ab/ab.fab (canonical · keyword)

Selects numeric range iteration in an itera loop.

# ab — bounded iteration step
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   iteraStmt :← 'itera' 'ab' expr '‥' expr step? 'fixum' ident block
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   Scalar stdout smoke (see body).
#

incipit {
    itera ab 0‥10 per 2 fixum i {
        nota i
    }
}

Expected output:

0
2
4
6
8
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/ab/ab.fab"]
